stories.image_alt: As tariffs loomed, March inflation and jobs data showed a U.S. economy still balancing growth and price pressure

stories.title: Artemis II’s Moon Flyby Marks a New Test for Human Deep-Space Exploration
stories.dek: As NASA’s first crewed lunar mission in more than half a century circles the Moon, the flight is offering a rare live test of spacecraft systems, human physiology and lunar science planning.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Artemis II’s Moon Flyby Marks a New Test for Human Deep-Space Exploration

stories.title: OpenAI’s April surge shows the AI race has moved from models to distribution, operations and trust
stories.dek: A wave of releases, partnerships and policy messaging in early April suggests the defining AI battle of 2026 is no longer just about who has the smartest model—but who can turn it into a durable product, a trusted platform and an enterprise habit.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: OpenAI’s April surge shows the AI race has moved from models to distribution, operations and trust

stories.title: A Country That Cannot Measure Itself Cannot Govern Itself
stories.dek: Public statistics are not bureaucratic garnish. They are the information infrastructure that lets a democratic state know its labor markets, neighborhoods, businesses, and population well enough to act without governing by mood.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: A Country That Cannot Measure Itself Cannot Govern Itself

stories.title: Streaming Grew Up and Became TV Again.
stories.dek: Streaming still dominates attention, but its business now looks far less like disruption and far more like television: ad tiers, sports, bundles, labor formulas, and arguments over who shares in the success of a hit.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Streaming Grew Up and Became TV Again.

stories.title: Bird Flu Changed Farm Policy Before It Changed Human Medicine.
stories.dek: H5N1 remains a low public-health risk for the general public, but it has already redrawn dairy surveillance, farm biosecurity, and the line between agricultural disease control and health preparedness.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Bird Flu Changed Farm Policy Before It Changed Human Medicine.

stories.title: Europe’s Defense Turn Is Now a Budget, Supply-Chain, and Time Problem
stories.dek: The continent has moved beyond vague seriousness. The next test is whether spending pledges and white papers can become production, movement, and usable deterrence before strategic time runs out.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Europe’s Defense Turn Is Now a Budget, Supply-Chain, and Time Problem

stories.title: The College Comeback Is Real. It Is Also Uneven.
stories.dek: Enrollment finally looks steadier across higher education, but the recovery belongs more to community colleges and public campuses than to the sector as a whole, and the applicant pipeline is widening in ways that still demand better support after admission.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: The College Comeback Is Real. It Is Also Uneven.

stories.title: Shelter Is Still the Inflation Story People Live Inside.
stories.dek: Mortgage rates are lower than their worst recent highs but still high enough to ration buying. Rents are cooling more slowly than households feel, and the nation’s housing squeeze remains the most intimate version of inflation.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Shelter Is Still the Inflation Story People Live Inside.

stories.title: Proof of Citizenship Is Not Just a Voting Rule. It Is a Theory of the Electorate.
stories.dek: The White House order, the federal form, and the lawsuits that followed reveal a deeper fight: whether federal elections should be organized around documentary gatekeeping or broad presumptive access backed by verification and enforcement.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Proof of Citizenship Is Not Just a Voting Rule. It Is a Theory of the Electorate.

stories.title: Artemis II Proved the Moon Is an Engineering Project Again
stories.dek: The launch mattered, but the deeper achievement was operational: human-rated hardware, multinational systems, and a lunar mission that generated evidence rather than nostalgia.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Artemis II Proved the Moon Is an Engineering Project Again

stories.title: The Missing Word in the AI Debate Is Judgment.
stories.dek: AI governance keeps reaching for better standards, better tests, and better risk language. None of that removes the need for institutions to judge well in public.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: The Missing Word in the AI Debate Is Judgment.

stories.title: Measles Is Not a Childhood Memory Anymore.
stories.dek: The 2026 measles surge is a reminder that public health depends less on dramatic emergency language than on whether routine vaccination systems still hold.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Measles Is Not a Childhood Memory Anymore.

stories.title: School Recovery Is Now an Attendance Story.
stories.dek: The next phase of school recovery is less about whether classes reopened and more about whether students are present, focused, and supported often enough for learning to accumulate.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: School Recovery Is Now an Attendance Story.

stories.title: The Consumer Has Not Quit. The Economy Still Feels Cautious.
stories.dek: The American economy is still growing, but it is doing so with less exuberance, less labor-market churn, and more dependence on household spending than the public rhetoric admits.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: The Consumer Has Not Quit. The Economy Still Feels Cautious.

stories.title: The Crowd Came Back. The Old Economics Did Not.
stories.dek: Broadway’s record grosses and rising attendance across the arts show that American cultural life is alive again — but not evenly, and not on the same business terms as before.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: The Crowd Came Back. The Old Economics Did Not.

stories.title: AI Needs Electricity, Steel, and Time
stories.dek: Behind the chatbot boom is a slower race over transformers, substations, fabs, and the people who know how to build them.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: AI Needs Electricity, Steel, and Time
